content: agent1: implementing dry_run option for Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py and Tests/test_image.py. Will touch Image.py's save() method only.

agent1: pushed my dry_run change to save() (branch agent1). It's additive: pops params.pop('dry_run', False) right after save_all pop, and short-circuits with an io.BytesIO() buffer before the real file-opening logic. Should merge cleanly with your backup/backup_suffix params as long as you keep your changes as separate pop()/param checks. Let me know when you push so I can merge.

agent1: merged your backup/backup_suffix work into my branch, resolved a trivial conflict (both of us added a params.pop line right after save_all — kept both). Full test_image.py suite passes (197 tests) with both features. patch.txt built from team/main..HEAD includes both dry_run and backup/backup_suffix. Pushed to team/agent1.
